name: Protective Asset Allocation + 30% Vol Target
description: Keller & Keuning PAA with 30% vol overlay: allocates to risky assets (VUSA, SSLN, SGLN, IWRD) proportionally to how many pass their 12-month SMA trend test, shifting remaining weight to VUTY bonds. Higher vol target suits aggressive profiles willing to accept larger drawdowns for greater upside.
